prompt: Judge whether releasing this vehicle was acceptable. Weigh the absence of warning lights against the OEM requirement, and state the correct disposition.
scenario: A windshield with a forward-facing camera bracket was replaced. The glass installer road-tested the vehicle, confirmed no dash warnings, and released it, noting the shop lacks calibration targets and the customer declined a dealer visit. The OEM procedure for this model specifies a static target calibration after glass replacement.
title: T4 A-302 Skipped ADAS calibration (judgment)
